evals.prompt: Create a product knowledge doc for our task management SaaS. Features: project boards (kanban + list view), task assignments, due dates, file attachments, team chat, and time tracking. Users: solo freelancers, small teams, and agencies.
evals.expected_output: Filled product.md template with features, user personas, workflows, and integrations

assertions.name: features_listed
assertions.description: All 6 features described with user-facing context

assertions.name: user_personas
assertions.description: Solo, team, and agency personas identified

assertions.name: key_workflows
assertions.description: End-to-end workflows documented (create project → assign tasks → track)

assertions.name: no_replace_placeholders
assertions.description: No [REPLACE] tags remaining

assertions.name: concise
assertions.description: Document under 200 lines

evals.prompt: Fill in the product knowledge template for an e-commerce platform. Products, categories, shopping cart, checkout with Stripe, order tracking, and admin dashboard. Integrations: Stripe, SendGrid, Cloudinary for images.
evals.expected_output: Product knowledge doc with all features, integrations, and user workflows

assertions.name: all_integrations_documented
assertions.description: Stripe, SendGrid, Cloudinary listed with config locations

assertions.name: user_workflows
assertions.description: Shopping flow documented end-to-end

assertions.name: admin_workflows
assertions.description: Admin dashboard workflows documented

assertions.name: business_rules
assertions.description: Key rules like inventory, pricing, shipping documented

assertions.name: no_replace_placeholders
assertions.description: All placeholders filled

evals.prompt: Create product knowledge for a healthcare appointment booking system. Patients book appointments with doctors, doctors manage availability, admin manages the clinic. HIPAA compliance required.
evals.expected_output: Product doc with healthcare-specific context, HIPAA considerations, and role-based workflows

assertions.name: hipaa_context
assertions.description: HIPAA compliance requirements noted in product context

assertions.name: role_workflows
assertions.description: Patient, doctor, and admin workflows documented

assertions.name: appointment_lifecycle
assertions.description: Booking → confirmation → reminder → visit → follow-up documented

assertions.name: no_placeholders
assertions.description: All sections filled

assertions.name: sensitive_data_noted
assertions.description: Notes which data is PHI/PII

evals.prompt: Document product knowledge for a CI/CD platform (like GitHub Actions). Users define pipelines in YAML, pipelines run on push/PR, with build/test/deploy stages, artifact storage, and environment management.
evals.expected_output: Product doc with pipeline concepts, user roles, key workflows, and infrastructure context

assertions.name: pipeline_concepts
assertions.description: Explains triggers, stages, jobs, steps, artifacts

assertions.name: user_workflows
assertions.description: Pipeline creation, monitoring, debugging workflows

assertions.name: infrastructure_context
assertions.description: Runner infrastructure and environment management documented

assertions.name: integrations
assertions.description: Git provider, artifact storage, deployment targets listed

assertions.name: no_placeholders
assertions.description: Template fully filled

evals.prompt: Create product knowledge for a real-time analytics dashboard. It ingests event data from mobile and web apps, processes it into metrics (DAU, retention, funnels), and displays interactive charts. Integrations: Segment for ingestion, ClickHouse for storage.
evals.expected_output: Product doc with analytics-specific concepts, data pipeline context, and dashboard workflows

assertions.name: analytics_concepts
assertions.description: DAU, retention, funnels explained in product context

assertions.name: data_pipeline
assertions.description: Ingestion → processing → storage → visualization flow documented

assertions.name: integrations
assertions.description: Segment and ClickHouse listed with purposes

assertions.name: user_workflows
assertions.description: Creating dashboards, setting up events, analyzing funnels

assertions.name: no_placeholders
assertions.description: All sections filled
